meta.description: WI4 Golden Samples - Backtest pipeline regression verification

samples.description: Bull market scenario - 601857.SH sustained uptrend (4.27 to 7.19, +68%), positive IC stable, momentum signals effective
samples.market_context: 2023 Feb-Oct: State-owned enterprise revaluation theme drove 601857.SH higher. Started at 4.27, +12.22% in Mar, +31.45% in Apr, consolidation May-Jun, continued rising Jul-Sep to 7.19. Only Aug showed mild correction (-4.09%). Strong capital inflow throughout.
samples.rationale: Strong uptrend should generate many long signals. IC positive (trend following effective), win rate moderate-high. Turnover moderate - clear trend avoids excessive signals.

samples.description: Oscillating/neutral scenario - 601857.SH range-bound (9.15 to 8.55, -6.6%), IC near zero, directional signals weak
samples.market_context: 2024 Jun-Sep: Jun sideways (9.15-9.51), Jul spike and crash (-13.94%), Aug lows (-1.08%), Sep rebound (+3.01%). Price oscillates 7.67-9.61 range without clear direction. Long-short seesaw, trend strategies underperform.
samples.rationale: Range-bound market, no clear direction. IC near zero (alternating signs). Win rate near 50% (random level). Turnover slightly higher - price oscillating around MAs triggers frequent signal flips.

samples.description: Extreme volatility scenario - 601857.SH wild swings (3.68 to 4.65, +26% but with -12%/-13% monthly drawdowns), IC highly volatile
samples.market_context: 2021 Aug to 2022 Mar: Energy sector extreme volatility driven by oil price spikes and Russia-Ukraine tensions. Aug +5.71%, Sep +24.42% (surge), Oct -12.65% (crash), Nov -12.24% (continued drop), Dec +1.02%, Feb 2022 +5.20% (geopolitical), Mar -3.68% (range 16.45%). Price oscillates 3.68-4.84 with monthly amplitude up to 34.45%.
samples.rationale: Extreme volatility causes frequent trend reversals. IC potentially negative (chasing trends gets whipsawed). Low win rate. Highest turnover - violent price swings trigger repeated buy-sell signals.
